steps: 1x Magic Red solution for last 00:15:00 at 37 °C in cell culture incubator.
Leica Stellaries 8 confocal laser scanning microscope, assembled with live cell chamber with CO 2 gas, temperature and humidity controlled.
Image analysis: Image J. quantification of the % area of the cell covered by Magic Red signal, as well as total signal intensity per cell.
